Spring Data Elasticsearch
  1. org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.convert
  2. ElasticsearchConverter

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.convert.ElasticsearchConverter

Packages that use ElasticsearchConverter
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc
This package contains classes that use the new Elasticsearch client library (co.elastic.clients:elasticsearch-java) to access Elasticsearch.
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.config
 
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core
 
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.convert
 
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.index
